prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime movie poster in a gritty ink-and-watercolor collage style for Naruto Uzumaki. The composition centers on a huge left-facing side profile of a teenage ninja with spiky bright blond hair, blue eye, three whisker marks on his cheek, and a black forehead protector with a metal plate engraved with the leaf spiral symbol. Inside and around the silhouette of his head, blend a sepia-orange montage of exactly 8 story elements: a snarling red nine-tailed fox head at the upper right, a charging orange-clad ninja with a kunai at mid-right, a masked silver-haired ninja holding a glowing blue energy sphere at lower right, a small team of dark shinobi figures near the upper center, two blurred small character portraits in the middle, one tiny battle scene near the lower center, and black village gates and ruins layered through the background. At the bottom foreground, show the same blond ninja from behind, standing on a dark rock ledge in an orange-and-black jumpsuit with a pouch, headband tails fluttering, looking over a detailed hidden village below a rugged mountain range carved with faces. Surround the scene with expressive black ink splashes, rough brush strokes, smoky grunge textures, flying orange leaves and embers, warm burnt orange and deep black shadows against an off-white paper background. Add large vertical Japanese brush-calligraphy title text on the left reading うずまき ナルト, a small orange leaf spiral emblem below it, a red square seal stamp near the lower left reading 忍道, thin vertical Japanese tagline text on the right reading 火影になるために, and smaller vertical Japanese text near the title reading 木ノ葉の忍、誇りを胸に。. At the bottom center, add small serif roman text reading “NARUTO UZUMAKI” with a tiny subtitle line beneath it. Use cinematic poster lighting, high detail, dynamic asymmetrical layout, traditional Japanese ink painting texture, anime accuracy, no photorealism.
